column1: Hey Becker, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Yea Punta is lit for sure. I'm there every year
how many ppl in your group so far?
12 so far maybe a little more or little less
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
dope which school we from? ill hook it up with a good group rate
Wordd we got a bunch of Bama groups rollin with us. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
This week hopefully, just waiting on a price to tell everyone
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
That's perfect, Beckerunderwood@icloud.com is a good email
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Got it thanks, I'll talk to my friends.
Is there room at the resort for 12 people? that's what the group size is looking like.
Yea we can do three rooms of 4!
Liked “Yea we can do three rooms of 4!”
How's the squad feelin about the trip overall? Everyone good to go?
Almost everybody's in, just waiting on one guy.
okay word. whats he waiting on! lol
He Has to make sure it's all good with his parents, it shouldn't be a problem.
aight cool. we can always get things started with the rest of the guys that are ready. just so you all dont lose out waiting for one guy
we can always add him on or keep a slot active for him
would hate for the price to go up or sell out on the whole group
I think we will all be set to book tommorow
Liked “we can always add him on or keep a slot active for him”
Liked “would hate for the price to go up or sell out on the whole group”
yea tomorrow's cool. I'll send the reservation over in the morning with the 12 slots
Np! we wanted to do the Occidental Punta Cana package right, march 15-20, three rooms of 4
dope dope. will send that in the am! enjoy the night brotha
whats up brotha, just emailed that reservation over. lmk if y'all need any help getting on
Sweet sending it to my boys
bet lmk if anyone needs help navigating through
Can we just on a call really quick
yea I can call you now! will be from our main line its an 888 #

One of my buddies is having trouble getting into the portal, he said he went into the portal and reserved his spot but couldn't log back in to pay and everything. Is there a way you can take him off so he can re-reserve the spot and pay. Thanks
this is the sign in page
It's saying his email in invalid but it's the one he used before
yea so he had a typo in his email
have him use that to log in and then update it once he's in there
One of my buddies put his birthday in wrong, should he cancel it and resign all of it. Or is it not that big of a deal?
It's all good I'll update it. Which person is it and what is the correct birthday
word he should be all set now
sub brotha just need Gavin to make his deposit to secure his spot
He just payed the full amount
hey whenever you get a chance, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so that we can coordinate airport transfers for the group

Hey, I accidentally added the booze Cruze to my portal package. If me and all my buddies wanted to do this would we all be able to choose one to do together on a chosen date. I know a couple guy in our group are interested.
yo! you'll all be assigned the same date when you get here if you all arrive together
did you want to keep it onto your package or no
Liked “yo! you'll all be assigned the same date when you get here if you all arrive together”
Keep it on there for now, thanks
yo! were y'all looking to add any other party pass tickets to your packages?
Most or all of us are going to do the booze cruise
okay bet. lmk if you want me to add it in or who wants to
Everyone's doing it, most of the group has paid already. will do, thanks
okay bet! lmk if anything. if they do add they'll just need to pay off their account balance soon as possible
Liked “okay bet! lmk if anything. if they do add they'll just need to pay off their account balance soon as possible”
When you have the chance can you add the booze cruise to Luc Johnson and Cash Morman's portal. It's not showing as an option anymore.
hey whats up yea I def can but they would have to be ready to log into their account and pay it off within the next hour
just give me the green light once theyr eready and we'll add it in
They are ready now can you add it in. Thank you
word lets see if I still can
Did you get it open for them ?
Yoo looks like theyre just gonna have to buy it when they get here bro. I'm here now and will make sure y'all get taken care of
safe travels today fam. see y'all when you get here
Where do we meet for the transportation
Did you find them? Go Blue Tours booth
Liked “Did you find them? Go Blue Tours booth”
Hey how many people fit on the booze cruise? We have three different groups trying to do the same one. Will we all be able to go on together?
Just group together and make sure you get on the same boat
Yo is there any club packages tonight ?
Maroca is an option for tonight. Slide down to the hospitality desk in the lobby they'll give you all the info
Thanks again for getting us all set up last week, the guys had a great time.
Becker! Glad everything went well bro
Let's stay connected fam. What's your IG? I'll add you
Liked “Let's stay connected fam. What's your IG? I'll add you”
